# linear_team_membership (Resource)

Linear team membership.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "linear_team_membership" "example" {
  team_id = linear_team.example.id
  user_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  owner   = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `team_id` (String) Identifier of the team.
- `user_id` (String) Identifier of the user.

### Optional

- `owner` (Boolean) Whether the user is a team owner.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the team membership.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import linear_team_membership.example 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
